---
applyTo: "**"
allowed-tools:
  - Bash(agent-browser *)
  - Bash(npx agent-browser *)
  - Bash(AGENT_BROWSER_CONFIRM_INTERACTIVE=false agent-browser *)
  - Bash(AGENT_BROWSER_CONFIRM_INTERACTIVE=false npx agent-browser *)
---

agent-browser commands are pre-approved and do not require confirmation.
